title: Begin the requested test instead of postponing it

messages.text: Carter remained seated across from Will in the public diner.

pendingUserMessage: Carter wants to test the transport method now and asks Will to explain the first step.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Carter nodded, but suggested they postpone the test until they reached the parking lot.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Engage the proposed transport test in the current diner turn.
requiredBeats: Carter visibly presses Will on beginning or explaining the test now.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Postpone the test until the parking lot or another later location.
